properties.name: action
properties.description: A read-only HTML button element that represents the left button.

properties.name: indicator
properties.description: A read-only HTML button element that represents the right button.

properties.name: indicator-aria-label
properties.description: Accessible label for the secondary action

events.name: action-click
events.description: Event emitted when the action button is clicked

events.name: indicator-click
events.description: Event emitted when the indicator button is clicked

slots.name: default
slots.description: Content to be opened by the secondary action (e.g. Menu)
